# [DSP] Additional customer comms (compliance)

: Saksham Srivastava
Created time: May 26, 2025 5:55 PM
Status: In progress
Last edited: May 28, 2025 12:27 PM

# **What problem are we solving?**

Sending additional comms to users to comply with DLG and internal compliance requirements. 

---

# **How do we measure success?**

- Improved compliance
- No challenge on user acceptance on KFS/agreement

---

# **How are others solving this problem?**

---

# **What is the solution?**

## Requirements overview (optional)

Following additional comms need to be sent to the user: 

1. Application generated: User should be communicated over email when loan contract is generated for the customers. This is as per point (i)(b) of the NBFC fair practice code. https://www.rbi.org.in/commonman/english/scripts/Notification.aspx?Id=867
**Trigger:**  Generate KFS API is triggered by the LSP. 
**Email body:** As shown in the picture
**Variables required:** date, name of the applicant, oppId, product name (Loan against mutual funds), timestamp of KFS generation. 
**Sendgrid template ID**: d-6cdebdd4d34f4dbf97397458cd803b20
    
    ![image.png](%5BDSP%5D%20Additional%20customer%20comms%20(compliance)/image.png)
    
    <aside>
    💡
    
    Each time the KFS is generated this communication should go to the customer. In case KFS expires for the customer and is generated again this 
    
    </aside>
    
2. KFS accepted:  User needs to be communicated as soon as they accept the KFS.
**Trigger:** Customer accepts KFS. 
**Email body:** As shown in the picture
**Variables required:** date, name of the applicant, oppId, product name (Loan against mutual funds), timestamp of KFS acceptance. 
**Sendgrid template ID**: d-73e6a080504d45798416ab7d65b60e08
**Email attachment:** Filled, unsigned copy of KFS. Template is attached below.
    
    [Standalone KFS template.docx](%5BDSP%5D%20Additional%20customer%20comms%20(compliance)/Standalone_KFS_template.docx)
    
    ![image.png](%5BDSP%5D%20Additional%20customer%20comms%20(compliance)/image%201.png)
    
3. Agreement signed:  User needs to be communicated as soon as they sign the agreement. 
**Trigger**: Customer signs the agreement. 
**Email body:** As shown in the picture
**Variables required:** date, name of the applicant, oppId, product name (Loan against mutual funds), timestamp of agreement signing. 
**Sendgrid template ID**: d-56012fe419e84a679efd7b3b8f80319b
**Email attachment:** NBFC signed copy of the agreement will be sent to the customer (same agreement copy as welcome Email)
    
    ![image.png](%5BDSP%5D%20Additional%20customer%20comms%20(compliance)/image%202.png)
    
    <aside>
    💡
    
    There will not be any change in the Welcome email. 
    
    </aside>
